name: Kanban Spec
description: Product-spec layout inspired by kanban boards and sprint planning cards.

preview.sampleText: Board-inspired structure for scope, owners, and delivery milestones.

classes.h5: text-base font-semibold mt-4 mb-2 text-slate-700 uppercase tracking-wide
classes.h6: text-sm font-semibold mt-3 mb-2 text-slate-600 uppercase tracking-wider
classes.img: max-w-full my-5 rounded-lg border border-slate-300 shadow-sm
classes.table: table-auto my-5 w-full border-separate border-spacing-0 overflow-hidden rounded-lg
classes.th: border border-slate-300 p-2 bg-slate-200 text-left font-semibold text-slate-900 uppercase text-xs tracking-wide
classes.blockquote: my-5 rounded-r-lg border-l-4 border-amber-500 bg-amber-50 py-3 pl-4 text-slate-800
classes.code: rounded bg-slate-200 px-1.5 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-slate-900
classes.pre: my-5 rounded-lg border border-slate-300 bg-slate-900 p-4 text-slate-100 overflow-x-auto
